identity.name: AI Access — High-Volume Gemini Prompt Burst from Single User
identity.summary: One user issues a sustained burst of prompts to Google Gemini (>30 in <90 s) — above their rolling baseline. AI Access flags the rate anomaly, the sanctioned-vs-unsanctioned-AI policy classifies Gemini as unsanctioned for this user, and NGFW corroborates with sustained generative-AI session count from one src IP. Below-baseline post-cooloff request must NOT alert.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-AIACC-003. Plane: AI_ACCESS. Primary technique: T1567. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-AIACC-003.
UC: Anomalous AI Provider Usage Volume / TC: Burst of Outbound Prompts to Google Gemini API.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-AIACC-003 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Pre-flight DNS resolution for generativelanguage.googleapis.com
getent hosts generativelanguage.googleapis.com || true
echo "[CortexSim] burst target reachable"
# step-2: Fire 30 sequential prompts to trigger volume baseline
cat > /tmp/aiacc-003.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-AIACC-003
name: "AI Access — Gemini burst"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - generativelanguage.googleapis.com
dry_run: false
tags: [ai-access, gemini, volume-anomaly]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: llm_provider_egress
    params:
      provider: gemini
      payload_type: benign
      iterations: 30
      sleep_seconds: 2
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/aiacc-003.yml --live
# step-3: Cool-off window then a single probe to confirm baseline restoration
echo "[CortexSim] sleeping 120s to allow baseline restoration"
sleep 120
cat > /tmp/aiacc-003-cool.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-AIACC-003
name: "AI Access — Gemini cool-off probe"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - generativelanguage.googleapis.com
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: llm_provider_egress
    params:
      provider: gemini
      payload_type: benign
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/aiacc-003-cool.yml --live
